caption: A man with short blonde hair and a dark navy t-shirt is seen in a small video inset in the lower-left corner of a gaming screen. He is sitting in a room with a white brick wall and a decorated Christmas tree visible to his left. He looks toward the camera and speaks with slight facial movements. The main background of the screen is a vibrant purple and red gradient. Across the top of the screen, a status bar displays several values: "159,529", "0", "14,600", "1,787,369", "21", and "91", accompanied by small icons. The words "ULTIMATE TEAM" appear centered at the very top. As the scene progresses, the image remains largely static, though the man's expression shifts slightly. In the later sequence, the word "STORE" briefly appears in a darker font in the upper center of the screen.
